problem_text_cn: 1108 空气密度$\rho_A=1.3\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$、黏度$\eta=1.81\times10^{-5}\ \mathrm{Pa\cdot s}$，求半径$r_1=1.0\times10^{-3}\ \mathrm{mm}$和$r_2=5.0\times10^{-2}\ \mathrm{mm}$的雨滴下落的终极速度$v_{e1}$、$v_{e2}$。（雨滴密度$\rho_0=1.0\times10^3\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$，浮力可略）
problem_text_en: 1108 The density of air is $\rho_A=1.3\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$ and the viscosity is $\eta=1.81\times10^{-5}\ \mathrm{Pa\cdot s}$. Find the terminal velocities $v_{e1}$ and $v_{e2}$ of raindrops with radii $r_1=1.0\times10^{-3}\ \mathrm{mm}$ and $r_2=5.0\times10^{-2}\ \mathrm{mm}$ when falling. (Density of raindrops $\rho_0=1.0\times10^3\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$, buoyancy is negligible)
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】雨滴终极速度满足**重力与斯托克斯黏滞力平衡**，由$\dfrac{4}{3}\pi r^3 \rho_0 g = 6\pi r \eta v_e$化简得$v_e=2\rho_0 r^2 g/(9\eta)$，代入不同半径计算，利用$r_2=50r_1$得$v_{e2}=50^2 v_{e1}$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】The terminal velocity of a raindrop satisfies the **balance between gravity and Stokes viscous force**. Simplify from $\dfrac{4}{3}\pi r^3 \rho_0 g = 6\pi r \eta v_e$ to get $v_e=2\rho_0 r^2 g/(9\eta)$, substitute different radii for calculation, and use $r_2=50r_1$ to obtain $v_{e2}=50^2 v_{e1}$.
